mapper.sql: database_name, user_name, query_id, max(query_text) AS query_text, sum(delta_calls) AS calls, sum(delta_exec_time_ms) AS total_exec_time_ms, CASE WHEN sum(delta_calls)>0 THEN sum(delta_exec_time_ms)/sum(delta_calls) ELSE 0 END AS avg_exec_time_ms, max(COALESCE((metrics->>'min_exec_time_ms')::double precision,0)) AS min_exec_time_ms, max(COALESCE((metrics->>'max_exec_time_ms')::double precision,0)) AS max_exec_time_ms, max(COALESCE((metrics->>'stddev_exec_time_ms')::double precision,0)) AS stddev_exec_time_ms, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'plans')::double precision,0)) AS plan_count, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'total_plan_time')::double precision,0)) AS total_plan_time_ms, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'shared_blks_hit')::double precision,0)) AS shared_hit, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'shared_blks_read')::double precision,0)) AS shared_read, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'shared_blks_dirtied')::double precision,0)) AS shared_dirtied, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'shared_blks_written')::double precision,0)) AS shared_written, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'local_blks_hit')::double precision,0)) AS local_hit, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'local_blks_read')::double precision,0)) AS local_read, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'temp_blks_read')::double precision,0)) AS temp_read, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'temp_blks_written')::double precision,0)) AS temp_written, CASE WHEN max(COALESCE((metrics->>'io_timing_enabled')::double precision,0))>0 THEN sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'blk_read_time')::double precision,0)) END AS block_read_time_ms, CASE WHEN max(COALESCE((metrics->>'io_timing_enabled')::double precision,0))>0 THEN sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'blk_write_time')::double precision,0)) END AS block_write_time_ms, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'wal_records')::double precision,0)) AS wal_records, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'wal_fpi')::double precision,0)) AS wal_fpi, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'wal_bytes')::double precision,0)) AS wal_bytes, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'jit_functions')::double precision,0)) AS jit_functions, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'jit_generation_time')::double precision,0) +COALESCE((metrics->>'jit_inlining_time')::double precision,0) +COALESCE((metrics->>'jit_optimization_time')::double precision,0) +COALESCE((metrics->>'jit_emission_time')::double precision,0)) AS jit_time_ms, sum(delta_rows) AS rows, min(collect_time) AS first_seen, max(collect_time) AS last_seen, max(stats_reset) AS stats_reset, GREATEST(0, max(deallocations)-min(deallocations)) AS deallocations
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM pg_query_stat_history WHERE GROUP BY database_name,user_name,query_id ) grouped

WITH current_window AS ( SELECT database_name,query_id,max(query_text) query_text, sum(delta_calls)::double precision calls, sum(delta_exec_time_ms)/NULLIF(sum(delta_calls),0) avg_exec_ms, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'total_plan_time')::double precision,0)) /NULLIF(sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'plans')::double precision,0)),0) avg_plan_ms, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'temp_blks_written')::double precision,0)) temp_written, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'wal_bytes')::double precision,0)) wal_bytes, max(COALESCE((metrics->>'stddev_exec_time_ms')::double precision,0)) stddev_exec_ms FROM pg_query_stat_history WHERE instance_id=#{instanceId} AND collect_time BETWEEN #{currentFrom} AND #{currentTo} GROUP BY database_name,query_id ), baseline_hourly AS ( SELECT database_name,query_id,date_trunc('hour',collect_time) bucket, sum(delta_calls)::double precision calls, sum(delta_exec_time_ms)/NULLIF(sum(delta_calls),0) avg_exec_ms, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'total_plan_time')::double precision,0)) /NULLIF(sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'plans')::double precision,0)),0) avg_plan_ms, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'temp_blks_written')::double precision,0)) temp_written, sum(COALESCE((metrics->>'wal_bytes')::double precision,0)) wal_bytes, max(COALESCE((metrics->>'stddev_exec_time_ms')::double precision,0)) stddev_exec_ms FROM pg_query_stat_history WHERE instance_id=#{instanceId} AND collect_time BETWEEN #{baselineFrom} AND #{baselineTo} AND EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM collect_time)=EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CAST(#{currentFrom} AS timestamp)) AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM collect_time)=EXTRACT(HOUR FROM CAST(#{currentFrom} AS timestamp)) GROUP BY database_name,query_id,date_trunc('hour',collect_time) ), baseline AS ( SELECT database_name,query_id,avg(calls) calls,avg(avg_exec_ms) avg_exec_ms, avg(avg_plan_ms) avg_plan_ms,avg(temp_written) temp_written, avg(wal_bytes) wal_bytes,avg(stddev_exec_ms) stddev_exec_ms FROM baseline_hourly GROUP BY database_name,query_id ) SELECT c.*,b.calls baseline_calls,b.avg_exec_ms baseline_avg_exec_ms, b.avg_plan_ms baseline_avg_plan_ms,b.temp_written baseline_temp_written, b.wal_bytes baseline_wal_bytes,b.stddev_exec_ms baseline_stddev_exec_ms, (SELECT max(h.collect_time) FROM pg_query_stat_history h WHERE h.instance_id=#{instanceId} AND h.database_name IS NOT DISTINCT FROM c.database_name AND h.query_id=c.query_id AND h.collect_time < #{baselineFrom}) last_seen_before_baseline FROM current_window c LEFT JOIN baseline b ON b.database_name IS NOT DISTINCT FROM c.database_name AND b.query_id=c.query_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pg_sql_regression_event (instance_id,database_name,query_id,query_text,regression_type,severity, baseline_from,baseline_to,current_from,current_to,baseline_value,current_value, change_ratio,evidence,detected_at) VALUES (#{event.instanceId},#{event.database},#{event.queryId},#{event.queryText}, #{event.type},#{event.severity},#{event.baselineFrom},#{event.baselineTo}, #{event.currentFrom},#{event.currentTo},#{event.baselineValue}, #{event.currentValue},#{event.changeRatio},CAST(#{event.evidenceJson} AS jsonb),now()) ON CONFLICT(instance_id,query_id,regression_type,current_from) DO UPDATE SET current_value=EXCLUDED.current_value,change_ratio=EXCLUDED.change_ratio, evidence=EXCLUDED.evidence,detected_at=now()
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_sql_regression_event WHERE instance_id=#{instanceId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pg_plan_history (instance_id,database_name,query_id,sql_hash,plan_hash,query_text, plan_json,node_summary,previous_plan_hash,plan_changed,captured_at) VALUES (#{plan.instanceId},#{plan.database},#{plan.queryId},#{plan.sqlHash},#{plan.planHash}, #{plan.queryText},CAST(#{plan.planJson} AS jsonb),CAST(#{plan.summaryJson} AS jsonb), #{plan.previousPlanHash},#{plan.planChanged},now()) ON CONFLICT(instance_id,database_name,query_id,plan_hash) DO NOTHING
